title: Strategy-mutation event
description: One tiered strategy-adaptation event for a live twin (§4 of the master plan). Every mutation is version-controlled with a mandatory rationale and committed publicly.

event_id.description: Stable unique id for this event.

twin_id.description: Twin the event belongs to (the learning twin; the frozen twin never mutates).

origin_date.description: The resolution/origin that triggered the reflection producing this event.

tier.description: Adaptation tier: ungated observation, evidence-gated hypothesis, or shadow-gated behavioral change.

gate_outcome.description: Outcome of the tier's gate for this event.

version.description: Strategy version this event produces or targets (VersionEntry).

rationale.description: Mandatory rationale for the mutation. PUBLIC.

confirmations.description: For hypotheses: number of confirming live resolutions accumulated so far.
